name: read_contract
description: Read the source code of a Solidity smart contract from a local file path.

path.description: Relative or absolute path to the .sol file

name: run_slither
description: Run the Slither static analysis tool on a Solidity file and return detected vulnerabilities.

path.description: Path to the .sol file to analyse

detectors.description: Optional list of specific detector names to run (e.g. reentrancy, uninitialized)

name: search_vulnerability_db
description: Search a database of known smart contract vulnerabilities and CVEs by keyword or pattern.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 5)

name: get_contract_abi
description: Fetch the ABI of a verified contract from Etherscan given its address and chain.

chain.description: Chain name: mainnet, sepolia, arbitrum, polygon

name: get_audit_report
description: Retrieve a past security audit report for a protocol by name or address.

protocol.description: Protocol name (e.g. Uniswap, Aave) or contract address

name: no_tool_needed
description: Use this when no tool is required and you can answer directly from existing knowledge or context.

reason.description: Brief explanation of why no tool is needed
